arts.ttl: Man City edging ahead of Real Madrid in race for £41.5m man
arts.sum: Real Madrid appear willing to re-sign left-back Theo Hernandez, however, according to reports, Man City are edging ahead in the race to land the 27-year-old. Ruben Amorim wants the player at Man United to replace Luke Shaw, who doesn’t appear to be able to get any sort of playing consistency because of his injury problems. […] The post Man City edging ahead of Real Madrid in race for £41.5m man appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “Nobody would like a stadium shouting ‘go die’ at you”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti spoke after the 1-0 win over Real Sociedad in the Copa del Rey semi-final first leg, but despite the victory was visibly upset by the treatment of Raúl Asencio at the Reale Arena. Today we rotated, but the team was solid, compact and played a very good game defensively.

arts.ttl: Alguacil: “Obviously I condemn the (Asencio die) chants”
arts.sum: I’d like to thank the players for the great game they played against Real Madrid, being superior in the first half, and also the welcome from the fans, together we are stronger. “We didn’t deserve to be down 0-1 at half-time, but Madrid is the best team in the world, I said that yesterday, and in the first half they got it right in the only chance they had.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Sociedad 0 - 1 Real Madrid, Post-game, Copa del Rey 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani discusses: Kiyan’s analysis of the win: Performances of Endrick, Jude, Vinicius, and MUCH more.

arts.ttl: European football: Endrick shows Real Madrid not toothless without Mbappé
arts.sum: Sociedad beaten in Copa after Mbappé has tooth removed Juve out of Coppa Italia: Longoria handed 15-match ban Kylian Mbappé’s replacement Endrick gave Real Madrid a 1-0 win at Real Sociedad in the first leg of the Copa del Rey semi-finals on Wednesday. Madrid were without Mbappé after he had tooth removed and was forced to miss training on Tuesday. But 18-year-old Brazilian forward Endrick stepped in to score a goal on the counterattack after Jude Bellingham’s long pass. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid match paused over Asencio chants
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Copa del Rey game at Real Sociedad was briefly suspended Wednesday, following chants from the crowd aimed at Madrid defender Raúl Asencio.

arts.ttl: Endrick gives Madrid edge in 1st leg of Copa SF
arts.sum: Teenage striker Endrick scored the only goal as a second-string Real Madrid side did enough to grab a nervy 1-0 at Real Sociedad in the first leg of their Copa del Rey semi-final on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Endrick fires Real Madrid to 1-0 win in first leg of Copa del Rey semifinals
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé's replacement Endrick scored a first-half goal and Real Madrid won 1-0 at Real Sociedad in the first leg of the Copa del Rey semifinals on Wednesday. On Tuesday in the first leg of the other semifinals, Barcelona and Atletico Madrid drew 4-4.

arts.ttl: Endrick hands Real Madrid narrow lead over Real Sociedad in Copa del Rey semi-finals
arts.sum: Los Blancos head back to the Bernabeu with clear advantage as returning Jude Bellingham proves influential

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star limps out of Real Sociedad clash with injury
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid were this evening dealt a potentially costly blow on the personnel front. This comes after Dani Ceballos was forced out of Los Blancos’ Copa del…
